mapper.insert: insert into book_borrow_detail_image (borrow_detail_id, borrow_order_id, borrow_order_no, image_id, image_name, image_url, thumb_url, sort_order, image_type, image_status, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, created_at) values (#{borrowDetailId}, #{borrowOrderId}, #{borrowOrderNo}, #{imageId}, #{imageName}, #{imageUrl}, #{thumbUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{imageType}, 0, #{createStaffId}, #{createStaffName}, now())
